# PuntGuide

> PuntGuide is an Australian sports betting tips and bookmaker comparison site. It publishes free daily tips for AFL, NRL, horse racing, MLB, NBA and NFL, alongside independent reviews of 130+ licensed Australian bookmakers, betting tools, and odds guides. All content is editorial opinion; 18+ only; Australian residents only.

## Today's Tips

- [Horse Racing Tips Today](https://puntguide.com.au/horse-racing-tips-today.html): Today's best horse racing selections from meetings across Australia. Straight WIN bets under $10, each-way for $10+.
- [MLB Tips Today](https://puntguide.com.au/mlb-tips-today.html): Today's MLB picks with 3-leg multi options. Banker repeats across combos; max 4 legs per multi.
- [NRL Round 15 Tips 2026](https://puntguide.com.au/nrl-round-15-tips-2026.html): NRL Round 15 match previews, line bets and try scorer tips.
- [AFL Round 14 Tips 2026](https://puntguide.com.au/afl-round-14-tips-2026.html): AFL Round 14 match previews, line bets and goal scorer tips.
- [NBA Finals Game 4 Tips — Spurs vs Knicks](https://puntguide.com.au/nba-finals-game-4-spurs-vs-knicks-2026.html): Game 4 preview, odds, props and tactical breakdown. Best Bet: Knicks ML $1.78.

## Tips Hubs

- [AFL Tips 2026](https://puntguide.com.au/afl-tips.html): Full season AFL tips hub with round-by-round links and record tracker.
- [NRL Tips 2026](https://puntguide.com.au/nrl-tips.html): Full season NRL tips hub with round-by-round links and record tracker.
- [Horse Racing Tips](https://puntguide.com.au/horse-racing-tips-today.html): Daily racing tips with WIN/EW selections across Australian metro and provincial meetings.
- [MLB Tips 2026](https://puntguide.com.au/mlb-tips.html): MLB season tips hub.
- [NFL Tips 2026](https://puntguide.com.au/nfl-tips.html): NFL season tips and Super Bowl odds guide.

## NBA Finals 2026 — Spurs vs Knicks

- [NBA Finals Game 4 Tips](https://puntguide.com.au/nba-finals-game-4-spurs-vs-knicks-2026.html): Game 4 preview at MSG. Knicks lead series 2-1. Thursday 12 June 10:40am AEST.
- [NBA Finals Game 3 Tips](https://puntguide.com.au/nba-finals-game-3-spurs-vs-knicks-2026.html): Game 3 recap and tips. Spurs won 115-111 at MSG.
- [NBA Finals Game 2 Tips](https://puntguide.com.au/nba-finals-game-2-spurs-vs-knicks-2026.html): Game 2 preview and tips.
- [NBA Finals Game 1 Tips](https://puntguide.com.au/nba-finals-game-1-spurs-vs-knicks-2026.html): Series opener tips.
- [NBA Finals Series Preview](https://puntguide.com.au/nba-finals-spurs-vs-knicks-2026.html): Full series preview — Spurs vs Knicks 2026.
- [NBA Championship Odds 2026](https://puntguide.com.au/nba-championship-odds-2026.html): Live championship futures.

## Tips Records

- [AFL Tips Record 2026](https://puntguide.com.au/afl-tips-record-2026.html): Season profit/loss record for all AFL tips published on PuntGuide.
- [NRL Tips Record 2026](https://puntguide.com.au/nrl-tips-record-2026.html): Season profit/loss record for all NRL tips.
- [Horse Racing Tips Record 2026](https://puntguide.com.au/horse-racing-tips-record-2026.html): Full record of all racing selections with results and P&L.
- [MLB Tips Record 2026](https://puntguide.com.au/mlb-tips-record-2026.html): MLB season tips record.

## Bookmaker Comparisons

- [All 130+ Bookmakers](https://puntguide.com.au/all-betting-sites.html): Complete directory of every licensed Australian bookmaker.
- [Best Betting Sites Australia](https://puntguide.com.au/best-betting-sites-australia.html): Top-ranked Australian bookmakers by overall quality.
- [Best Betting Apps](https://puntguide.com.au/best-betting-apps-australia.html): Best mobile betting apps for Australian punters.
- [Fastest Payout Betting Sites](https://puntguide.com.au/fastest-payout-betting-sites-australia.html): Bookmakers ranked by withdrawal speed.
- [Best for AFL & NRL](https://puntguide.com.au/best-betting-sites-afl-nrl.html): Best bookmakers specifically for AFL and NRL betting.
- [Best for AFL](https://puntguide.com.au/best-betting-sites-for-afl.html): AFL-specific bookmaker rankings.
- [Best for Racing](https://puntguide.com.au/best-betting-sites-for-racing.html): Best bookmakers for horse racing.
- [Best for MLB](https://puntguide.com.au/best-bookmakers-for-mlb.html): Best bookmakers for MLB betting in Australia.
- [Best for NBA](https://puntguide.com.au/best-nba-betting-sites-australia.html): Best bookmakers for NBA betting in Australia.
- [Best for Multis](https://puntguide.com.au/best-bookmakers-for-multis.html): Best bookmakers for multi/parlay bets.
- [Best for Player Props](https://puntguide.com.au/best-bookmakers-for-player-props.html): Best bookmakers for player prop markets.

## Tools

- [Smart Bookie Matcher](https://puntguide.com.au/bookie-matcher.html): Answer a few questions to find your best-matched Australian bookmaker.
- [Cash Out Calculator](https://puntguide.com.au/cashout-calculator.html): Calculate whether a bookmaker's cash out offer is fair value.
